creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, 3 Nov 2006 12:40:40 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of polish/kadu,
>
> Please note that PR ports/105109 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105109

approve

>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
